$operator.summary: Pancreator-owned brief primitives shared by every installation. Target repositories extend these definitions in docs/operator-briefs/project.json.

general.label: General brief
general.description: A concise operator brief for mixed information and actions.

workflow-run.label: Workflow run
workflow-run.description: Pancreator run state, stage outcomes, validation, risks, and next actions.

release.label: Release brief
release.description: Release scope, validation, risk, rollback, and operator decision.

executive-summary.label: Executive summary
executive-summary.description: Bottom line, why it matters, outcomes, and immediate actions.

actions.label: Actions
actions.description: Decisions or tasks that require operator attention.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.description: Run stages, state, ownership, and transitions.

context.label: Context
context.description: Background information needed to interpret the brief.

summary.label: Summary
summary.description: A compact outcome or state summary.

action.label: Action
action.description: A decision or next step with an explicit call to action.

run-stage.label: Run stage
run-stage.description: A Pancreator workflow stage and its current outcome.

validation.label: Validation
validation.description: A check, suite, or evidence-backed verdict.

risk.label: Risk
risk.description: A blocker, uncertainty, or material caveat.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.description: Stable run, issue, artifact, or external identifier.
